title: Arirang World Tour — Goyang Night 2 Live-Viewed in 75+ Countries via Global Cinema
detail: BTS performs the second of three sold-out Goyang Stadium shows on April 11, 2026 — broadcast live simultaneously to cinemas in 75+ countries, the largest theatrical simulcast of the ARIRANG tour. Screenings are available through AMC, Cinemark, Harkins, Cineplex, and partner exhibitors worldwide. A full 2-hour runtime from the 360-degree in-the-round Goyang production is included. The global live viewing marks BTS's first theatrical simulcast since their COVID-era 'Permission to Dance on Stage' online concerts.

media.caption: BTS Goyang Night 2 live cinema viewing — screened in 75+ countries via AMC, Cinemark, Harkins, and Cineplex

title: Billboard Confirms ARIRANG at No. 1 for Second Consecutive Week — 187K Units; K-pop First
detail: Billboard's April 11-dated chart confirms ARIRANG held #1 on the Billboard 200 for a second consecutive week with 187,000 equivalent album units — making it the first K-pop album in history to spend back-to-back weeks atop the chart. NPR, Variety, and Billboard all report the milestone, noting ARIRANG edged out Kanye West's 'Bully' (which debuted at #2). UPI further reports ARIRANG is tracking toward an unprecedented third consecutive No. 1 on the April 18-dated chart.

media.caption: ARIRANG holds #1 on Billboard 200 for second consecutive week — a K-pop first
